# Atmospheric tracer concentrations for FESOM-2.x, version 25.08.1

# CO2 values for 1850-2014 CE for CMIP6-historical runs by Meinshausen et al. 2017, https://doi.org/10.5194/gmd-10-2057-2017
# CO2 values for 2015-2023 from NOAA by Lan et al. 2025, https://doi.org/10.15138/9N0H-ZH07

# Delta14C for 1850-2015 by Graven et al. 2017
# https://doi.org/10.5194/gmd-10-4405-2017-supplement

# Delta14C for 2016-2019 by Hua et al. 2021,
# https://doi.org/10.1017/RDC.2021.95

# delta13C for 1850-2015 by Graven et al. 2017,
# https://doi.org/10.5194/gmd-10-4405-2017-supplement

# CFCs and SF6 for 1850-2022 by Bullister & Warner 2023, 
# https://www.ncei.noaa.gov/data/oceans/ncei/ocads/data/0164584/CFC_ATM_Hist_2022/Tracer_atmospheric_histories_revised_2023_Table1.csv

# Compiled using 'update_trace_gases.py' by Martin Butzin
# martin.butzin@awi.de, 26 August 2025

#Year, CO2, D14C_NH, D14C_TZ, D14C_SH, d13C, CFC11_NH, CFC11_SH, CFC12_NH, CFC12_SH, SF6_NH, SF6_SH
#CE, ppm, permil, permil, permil, permil, ppt, ppt, ppt, ppt, ppt, ppt
